HEADING: Connect FastComments to Vercel
SUBTITLE: Select which Vercel projects should receive your FastComments configuration as environment variables.
NO_PROJECTS: No projects found in your Vercel account.
EXPOSE_API_KEY: Include API key (for server-side features like SSO)
EXPOSE_API_KEY_HINT: Adds FASTCOMMENTS_API_KEY to your project. Only enable this if you need server-side SSO or admin API access.
